title: Senior Backend Engineer
score_reasoning: Your technical profile is a strong match for the Senior Backend Engineer role—7 years of Python/Go production experience, proven microservices architecture expertise, and scaling distributed systems directly align with Via's requirements. The seniority level and emphasis on system design, mentorship, and end-to-end ownership fit your career trajectory well. However, the role is based in Tel Aviv with hybrid work anchored there, which creates a significant geographic and timezone mismatch. The job does not explicitly state remote flexibility, and Tel Aviv is 7+ hours ahead of Berlin—well beyond your strict ±2h timezone preference and your remote-first setup requirement. Unless you are open to on-site or hybrid work in Israel, this role is not viable despite strong technical and seniority alignment.

red_flags: Location is Tel Aviv, not Europe—7+ hour timezone mismatch from Berlin
Hybrid role anchored to Tel Aviv office; no explicit remote flexibility stated
Conflicts with your stated preference for remote-first setup and Europe/UK/Switzerland regions
Would require relocation or frequent on-site presence in Israel
